{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220704412EC433BDC4FCC7F56604"}"},"total":206},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7587764219809432345","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"加油，目前看来写得很不错，喜欢主角这种在“恶（饿）”的这条路上一路走到黑的。[做鬼脸]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766667853,"group_id":"7573545590554889240","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"迷路的麋鹿","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4kNFItkpDapY2T+FzALSg0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dba78abe014145b2a8265080b25ac31b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702853&x-signature=37eRUpmevjSK8EfKkYBSQjLNB5s%3D","user_id":"94858132267","user_name":"是麋鹿不会迷路"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"94858132267","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7573545590554889240","book_info":{"abstract":"(女主鲁格赛特)
(非爽文，勿入，主角是反派，连输三阵，三次都是剧情需要，毕竟拼不过四奥)
(我写的书，不洗白主角，不为主角做辩护，他就是个反派，也不抹黑奥特战士，奥特战士就是光明与正义)
睁开眼睛，发现自己已经穿越了！
不过却是穿越到了奥特世界，成了一颗赤红色的怪兽卵，冥冥之中肩负着毁灭与吞噬的使命。
而且，坎瑟瑞斯发现，只要吃得下，自己就能从中获得能量！而且天地万物没什么是自己不能吃的！
光能量，好吃(๑´ڡ`๑)
黑暗能量，好吃(•؎ •)
奥特曼光线？抱着吸！好吃啊好吃(๑ᵔ⤙ᵔ๑)
除了某不知名的宇宙白细胞的安魂曲，任何光线，终将好吃爱吃૮₍ᵔ⤙ᵔ ₎ა
除了在宇宙中寻找美食外，坎瑟瑞斯还致力于与自己的好兄弟大黑牛蛙在宇宙中不停创业！
“坎瑟瑞斯，再信我一次，这一次，我们一定能建立起最强的帝国！”
『贝利亚，吾不会再帮你了！』
(本书的主线故事与简介其实关系不大，主角确实是个贪吃鬼，不过是完全的奥系反派，表现出来的样子没有多坏，但是干的事情细究起来很可怕的那种)","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3bd1f439dda18a83cd81d982474cc841","author":"9923","author_id":"","book_id":"7573545590554889240","book_name":"奥特：我是宇宙癌细胞","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#582848","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7573549185341850136","read_count":"17388","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"220105"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"84","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,反派,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/bfd49146a355cc7e6348a46f86e13c5e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779318281&x-signature=GxWjUJ8rxZdQZeQFgq1zwWQYSHE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1930345465524989","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"48"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220704412EC433BDC4FCC7F56604"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat
